name: u2X
description: 1U dual 2-channel unity mixer. Two independent sections each combine two signals into one output. Mute switch per section silences the output without disconnecting.

controls.name: Mute A
controls.description: Toggle switch that mutes the mixed output of section A.

controls.name: Mute B
controls.description: Toggle switch that mutes the mixed output of section B.

inputs.name: A In 1
inputs.description: First input to section A unity mixer.

inputs.name: A In 2
inputs.description: Second input to section A unity mixer.

inputs.name: B In 1
inputs.description: First input to section B unity mixer.

inputs.name: B In 2
inputs.description: Second input to section B unity mixer.

outputs.name: A Out
outputs.description: Unity mix of A In 1 and A In 2. Silenced when Mute A is engaged.

outputs.name: B Out
outputs.description: Unity mix of B In 1 and B In 2. Silenced when Mute B is engaged.

behaviors.name: Unity Mixing
behaviors.description: Each section sums its two inputs at unity gain. No attenuation or amplification — output equals the sum of both inputs.

behaviors.name: Mute
behaviors.description: Toggling the mute switch cuts the output of that section without affecting the input signals or the other section.

patchIdeas.name: Merge two LFOs
patchIdeas.patch: LFO 1 → A In 1 · LFO 2 → A In 2 · A Out → VCF CV

patchIdeas.name: CV + envelope sum
patchIdeas.patch: V/Oct → B In 1 · Envelope → B In 2 · B Out → VCO V/Oct for pitch + expression

patchIdeas.name: Live mute performance
patchIdeas.patch: Two audio sources into section A · mute switch for instant drop-outs
